summary: The implementation includes complete frontend with all required pages, routing, persistent player, UI components, and mock data hooks. However, the backend is nearly empty with only minimal type definitions and no actual methods implemented. All 16 backend requirements (REQ-1 through REQ-16) are missing their acceptance criteria implementations.

missing_requirements.requirement: Create backend data model for Song with all specified fields
missing_requirements.reason: Backend defines SongMetadata type but no Song type as specified, and no storage implementation for songs

missing_requirements.requirement: Create backend data model for UserProfile with userId as Principal and arrays for liked/downloaded songs
missing_requirements.reason: No UserProfile type defined in backend

missing_requirements.requirement: Create backend data model for ListeningHistory
missing_requirements.reason: No ListeningHistory type defined in backend

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement backend method to add songs
missing_requirements.reason: No addSong or equivalent method exists in backend actor

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement backend method to retrieve all songs
missing_requirements.reason: No getAllSongs or equivalent method exists in backend actor

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement backend method to get songs filtered by artist
missing_requirements.reason: No getSongsByArtist or equivalent method exists in backend actor

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement backend method to get songs filtered by album
missing_requirements.reason: No getSongsByAlbum or equivalent method exists in backend actor

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement backend method to search songs by query string
missing_requirements.reason: No searchSongs or equivalent method exists in backend actor

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement backend method to create or update user profile
missing_requirements.reason: No createOrUpdateProfile or equivalent method exists in backend actor

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement backend method to get user profile by Principal
missing_requirements.reason: No getProfile or equivalent method exists in backend actor

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement backend method to add song to liked songs array
missing_requirements.reason: No likeSong or equivalent method exists in backend actor

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement backend method to remove song from liked songs array
missing_requirements.reason: No unlikeSong or equivalent method exists in backend actor

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement backend method to add song to downloaded songs array
missing_requirements.reason: No addDownloadedSong or equivalent method exists in backend actor

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement backend method to record listening history entry
missing_requirements.reason: No recordListeningHistory or equivalent method exists in backend actor

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement backend method to get listening history filterable by time period
missing_requirements.reason: No getListeningHistory or equivalent method exists in backend actor
No recommendation method exists in backend actor

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement auto-queue functionality that fetches mood-based recommendations
missing_requirements.reason: PlayerContext handleEnded calls playNext but no backend integration for fetching recommendations based on current song mood
